creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexander Klein from comment #24)
It seems it doesn't appear in quarterly (see https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=209105#c9 ). If you want to test (and use) you can download the package from here: http://freebsd.uzsolt.hu/test_pkg/ . I'm using Quarterly too and it works.
